mapper.select: SELECT t1.role_code FROM mk_sys_role AS t1 LEFT JOIN mk_sys_user_role AS t2 ON t1.id = t2.role_id LEFT JOIN mk_sys_user AS t3 on t2.user_id = t3.id WHERE t3.is_delete = 0 AND t3.lock_flag = 0 AND t3.id = #{sysUserId}

SELECT t1.* FROM mk_sys_role AS t1 LEFT JOIN mk_sys_user_role AS t2 ON t1.id = t2.role_id LEFT JOIN mk_sys_user AS t3 on t2.user_id = t3.id WHERE t3.is_delete = 0 AND t3.lock_flag = 0 AND t3.id = #{sysUserId}
